title: begonia royleana
intro: Begonia royleana, also known as Royle's Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Begonia royleana is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
